title: ficus deltoidea subsp. motleyana
intro: Ficus deltoidea subsp. motleyana, also known as the Batai or Motley's Batai, is a plant species within the Ficus genus, commonly found in Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Malaysia and other parts of the region, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ficus deltoidea subsp. motleyana are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
